title: Buy groceries
body: Purchase milk, eggs, bread, and vegetables.

title: Finish project report
body: Complete the final draft and send it to the manager.

title: Book dentist appointment
body: Schedule a routine dental checkup for next week.

title: Workout session
body: Go for a 45-minute cardio and strength training session.

title: Read a book
body: Read at least 30 pages of the current novel.
